*** 3 INJ *** MULTIPLE HOMES DAMAGED...3 TRAILERS OVERTURNED...3 MINOR INJURIES...2 LIVESTOCK KILLED. MAX EF-1 TORNADO WITH SPOTTY EF-0/EF-1 DAMAGE CONFIRMED BY NWS SURVEY TEAM. MAX WINDS WERE 105 MPH...WITH A MAXIMUM WIDTH OF 100 YARDS. THE PATH OF THE TORNADO WAS 14 MILES IN LENGTH. EF-1 DAMAGE FOUND NEAR THE INTERSECTION OF CENTER RD. AND WEST JOHN PAUL JONES RD. THE TORNADO STARTED NEAR SOUTH CARTERSVILLE HIGHWAY NEAR CRAWFISH POND RD. AND ENDED NEAR HIGHWAY 301 NEAR INTERSECTION OF MCCAIN CIRCLE.
